
# default GOAMD64=v1
env GOARCH=amd64
! go list -f '{{ range $f := .GoFiles }}{{ $f }}{{ end }}'
! go build

# settable from the environment
env GOAMD64=v3
go list -f '{{ range $f := .GoFiles }}{{ $f }}{{ end }}'
stdout main.go
go build

# settable from the config file
env GOAMD64=
env GOENV=$WORK/env
go env -w GOAMD64=v3
go list -f '{{ range $f := .GoFiles }}{{ $f }}{{ end }}'
stdout main.go
go build

-- go.mod --
module test

-- main.go --
//go:build amd64.v3

package main

func main() {}
